error_message: Transform step failed: ValueError: invalid literal for OrderStatus enum: 'paid'. Allowed values: ['PAID', 'REFUNDED', 'CANCELLED', 'PENDING']
stack_trace_snippet:
File "transforms/order_status_mapper.py", line 47, in map_status
    return OrderStatus[raw_status]
KeyError: 'paid'
expected_root_cause_hint: schema drift from upstream Shopify API v2 (uppercase->lowercase enum change), compounded by recent commit a3f9c12 which itself was trying to address API v2 but mapping logic still expects old enum casing in this code path

error_message: Currency normalization step failed: KeyError: 'INR' not found in exchange_rate_lookup for date 2026-06-11
stack_trace_snippet:
File "transforms/currency_normalizer.py", line 33, in normalize_to_usd
    rate = exchange_rate_lookup[(currency, date)]
KeyError: ('INR', '2026-06-11')
expected_root_cause_hint: data gap in dim_exchange_rates for INR/BRL on 2026-06-11 due to vendor feed delay, combined with recent commit c9e1f45 which added a hard dependency on dim_exchange_rates having complete data with no fallback

stack_trace_snippet: Kubernetes event: container 'sap-export-loader' was OOMKilled. Memory limit: 1Gi. Memory usage at time of kill: ~1.02Gi
expected_root_cause_hint: recent commit d4a8b71 increased batch size 4x (5000->20000 rows) without increasing pod memory; combined with schema_changes showing SAP export volume increase ~4x from new EMEA warehouses, this matches past incident INC-1103 pattern almost exactly

error_message: WARNING: ingestion completed with 2 unrecognized fields in response payload (creative_id, creative_name). Pipeline did not fail but downstream dbt model 'stg_meta_ads' dropped these columns silently.
stack_trace_snippet:
No exception raised. Logged warning only:
WARN ingestion.meta_ads_client: unexpected fields in response: ['creative_id', 'creative_name']
expected_root_cause_hint: low severity / informational - recent commit e1c3a90 added these fields intentionally for upcoming creative-level attribution feature, but downstream schema/dbt model not yet updated to capture them. Similar pattern to past INC-1156 but lower severity since pipeline did not fail.
